emails.subject: I'm here...
emails.body: I'm here... ...but I was on the phone. Do you need a contract?

emails.subject: RE: I'm here...
emails.body: RE: I'm here... Do you have anything for HomeTown Communications Network. Looking for a gas contract dated 6/14/01 To: Nemec, Gerald

emails.subject: RE: I'm here...
emails.body: No, there is a terminated Pulp Paper GTC, but I can't find anything in Global or LiveLink for them for gas. Should I put on my Sherlock Holmes hat? To: Elledge, Susan

emails.subject: RE: I'm here...
emails.body: No. This must be the Pulp Paper GTC to which they are referring. They didn't specifically note it as a gas deal. Thanks for your help. To: Nemec, Gerald
